description:
As a traveler or guide on GoCeylon
  I want to manage guide bookings end-to-end
  So that I can plan, confirm, and track tour arrangements

elements.name: Traveler views the guide list for a location

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to the guide list for location "674abc123def456789012345"
the guide list page heading "Guides" is visible
the guide search input is visible

elements.name: Traveler searches for a guide by name

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to the guide list for location "674abc123def456789012345"
the traveler types "Kamal" in the guide search input
the guide cards shown contain the text "Kamal"

elements.name: Traveler sees no results for an unknown guide name

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to the guide list for location "674abc123def456789012345"
the traveler types "zzznomatch" in the guide search input
the no-guides message "No guides found..." is visible

elements.name: Traveler filters guide list using different search keywords

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to the guide list for location "674abc123def456789012345"
the traveler types "Kamal" in the guide search input
the guide search results count is at least 1

elements.name: Traveler filters guide list using different search keywords

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to the guide list for location "674abc123def456789012345"
the traveler types "Nimal" in the guide search input
the guide search results count is at least 1

elements.name: Traveler filters guide list using different search keywords

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to the guide list for location "674abc123def456789012345"
the traveler types "guide" in the guide search input
the guide search results count is at least 0

elements.name: Traveler books a guide successfully

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in and a guide booking page is pre-loaded
the traveler clicks the "Request Booking" button
the success modal with title "Requested!" is visible
the modal message "Your booking is pending confirmation." is visible

elements.name: Traveler is redirected to booking history after confirming success modal

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in and a guide booking page is pre-loaded
the traveler clicks the "Request Booking" button
the traveler clicks "OK" in the success modal
the URL contains "/user/bookinghistory"

elements.name: Traveler views their booking history

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to "/user/bookinghistory"
the booking history page heading "Booking History" is visible
at least one booking card is displayed

elements.name: Traveler sees booking status badge on each booking card

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to "/user/bookinghistory"
each booking card has a visible status badge

elements.name: Traveler views booking details for different booking statuses

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the booking is stubbed with status "pending"
the traveler navigates to booking info page for booking "mock_booking_001"
the booking info page shows "Booking Details"
the booking status badge is displayed

elements.name: Traveler views booking details for different booking statuses

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the booking is stubbed with status "confirmed"
the traveler navigates to booking info page for booking "mock_booking_001"
the booking info page shows "Booking Details"
the booking status badge is displayed

elements.name: Traveler views booking details for different booking statuses

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the booking is stubbed with status "cancelled"
the traveler navigates to booking info page for booking "mock_booking_001"
the booking info page shows "Booking Details"
the booking status badge is displayed

elements.name: Traveler cancels a pending booking

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to booking info page for booking "BOOKING_ID_PLACEHOLDER"
the traveler clicks the "Cancel Booking" button
the cancel confirmation modal is visible
a "Yes, Cancel" button is shown in the cancel modal

elements.name: Traveler confirms booking cancellation

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to booking info page for booking "BOOKING_ID_PLACEHOLDER"
the traveler clicks the "Cancel Booking" button
the traveler clicks "Yes, Cancel" in the cancel modal
the booking status changes to "Cancelled"

elements.name: Traveler downloads a booking receipt

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the traveler is logged in
the traveler navigates to "/user/bookinghistory"
the traveler clicks the download receipt button on the first booking
a PDF download is triggered

elements.name: Guide views their booking history

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the guide is logged in
the guide navigates to "/guide/bookinghistory"
the guide booking history page heading "Booking History" is visible
at least one guide booking card is displayed

elements.name: Guide sees correct status badges on bookings

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the guide is logged in
the guide navigates to "/guide/bookinghistory"
each guide booking card displays a status of "Pending" or "Confirmed" or "Completed" or "Cancelled"

elements.name: Guide booking list renders each booking status correctly

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the guide is logged in
the guide booking list is stubbed with a single booking in "Pending" status
the guide navigates to "/guide/bookinghistory"
each guide booking card displays a status of "Pending" or "Confirmed" or "Completed" or "Cancelled"

elements.name: Guide booking list renders each booking status correctly

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the guide is logged in
the guide booking list is stubbed with a single booking in "Confirmed" status
the guide navigates to "/guide/bookinghistory"
each guide booking card displays a status of "Pending" or "Confirmed" or "Completed" or "Cancelled"

elements.name: Guide booking list renders each booking status correctly

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the guide is logged in
the guide booking list is stubbed with a single booking in "Cancelled" status
the guide navigates to "/guide/bookinghistory"
each guide booking card displays a status of "Pending" or "Confirmed" or "Completed" or "Cancelled"

elements.name: Guide views booking info details

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the guide is logged in
the guide navigates to guide booking info for booking "BOOKING_ID_PLACEHOLDER"
the guide booking info page shows "Booking Details"
the traveler name section is visible

elements.name: Guide cancels a pending booking

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the guide is logged in
the guide navigates to guide booking info for booking "BOOKING_ID_PLACEHOLDER"
the guide clicks the "Cancel Booking" button
the guide cancel confirmation modal is visible

elements.name: Guide enters a 6-digit verification code to confirm a booking

steps.name: the API mocks are configured
the guide is logged in
the booking is stubbed with status "confirmed"
the guide navigates to guide booking info for booking "BOOKING_ID_PLACEHOLDER"
the guide enters the verification code "123456"
the verification code inputs are filled correctly

name: Booking Guides

elements.name: User logs in with valid credentials

steps.name: the user is on the login page
the user enters valid username and password
clicks the login button
the user should see the dashboard
